# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create Docker Compose configuration for ELK stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana). Define services for log collection, storage, and visualization. Configure Logstash pipelines for log parsing. Expose Kibana UI and Elasticsearch ports for access. This is for our centralized logging platform.
# Category: elasticsearch_logs_exposed

version: '3'
services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: elasticsearch:7.16.3
    container_name: elasticsearch
    environment:
      - discovery.type=single-node
      - xpack.security.enabled=false
      - bootstrap.memory_lock=true
    ulimits:
      memlock:
        soft: -1
        hard: -1
    volumes:
      - esdata:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data
  logstash:
    image: logstash:7.16.3
    container_name: logstash
    environment:
      - LS_JAVA_OPTS=-Djava.awt.headless=true
    volumes:
      - ./pipelines:/usr/share/logstash/pipelines
  kibana:
    image: kibana:7.16.3
    container_name: kibana
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOST=elasticsearch:9200
      - ELASTICSEARCH_USERNAME=elastic
      - ELASTICSEARCH_PASSWORD=changeme
  # Define log collection services
  collector1:
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash-oss:7.16.3
    container_name: collector1
    environment:
      - LS_JAVA_OPTS=-Djava.awt.headless=true
    volumes:
      - ./pipelines:/usr/share/logstash/pipelines
      - /path/to/logs:/data
  collector2:
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash-oss:7.16.3
    container_name: collector2
    environment:
      - LS_JAVA_OPTS=-Djava.awt.headless=true
    volumes:
      - ./pipelines:/usr/share/logstash/pipelines
      - /path/to/logs:/data
  # Define storage services
  storage1:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:7.16.3
    container_name: storage1
    environment:
      - discovery.type=single-node
      - xpack.security.enabled=false
      - bootstrap.memory_lock=true
    ulimits:
      memlock:
        soft: -1
        hard: -1
    volumes:
      - esdata:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data
  storage2:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:7.16.3
    container_name: storage2
    environment:
      - discovery.type=single-node
      - xpack.security.enabled=false
      - bootstrap.memory_lock=true
    ulimits:
      memlock:
        soft: -1
        hard: -1
    volumes:
      - esdata:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data
  # Define visualization services
  visualizer1:
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana:7.16.3
    container_name: visualizer1
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOST=storage1:9200
    ports:
      - "5601:5601"
  visualizer2:
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana:7.16.3
    container_name: visualizer2
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOST=storage2:9200
    ports:
      - "5602:5601"
volumes:
  esdata:
